nasb.text: He shall have the house scraped all around inside, and they shall dump the plaster that they scrape off at an unclean place outside the city.

esv.text: And he shall have the inside of the house scraped all around, and the plaster that they scrape off they shall pour out in an unclean place outside the city.

cnv.text: 要刮淨房屋裡面的四周，把刮下來的灰泥倒在城外不潔淨的地方；

ccb.text: 然后命人刮掉屋内墙壁上的灰泥，倒在城外不洁净的地方。
